nasb.text: He returned to his brothers and said, “The boy is not there; as for me, where am I to go?”

esv.text: and returned to his brothers and said, “The boy is gone, and I, where shall I go?”

cnv.text: 他回到兄弟們那裡去，說：“孩子不見了，我可到哪裡去呢？”

ccb.text: 回到弟兄们那里说：“那少年不见了，我现在怎么办？”

csbs.text: 回到他的兄弟们那里，说：“那孩子不在了，而我该何去何从？”
